name: ES7243E
description: The `es7243e` platform allows your ESPHome devices to use the ES7243E high performance four channel audio ADC ([datasheet](https://www.lcsc.com/datasheet/lcsc_datasheet_2410121611_Everest-semi-Everest-Semiconductor-ES7243E_C2929446.pdf)). This allows attached microphones to be used as a microphone input via [I2S Audio](https://esphome.io/components/microphone/i2s_audio/).

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the driver. Defaults to `0x40`.

config_entries.label: I2C ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the [I²C bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) the ES7243e is connected to.

config_entries.label: Mic Gain
config_entries.description: The gain applied to the ADC microphones. One of `0DB`, `3DB`, `6DB`, `9DB`, `12DB`, `15DB`, `18DB`, `21DB`, `24DB`, `27DB`, `30DB`, `33DB`, `34.5DB`, `36DB`, or `37.5DB`. Defaults to `24DB`.
